title: Soulcore
description: Soul-core is the common library/foundation of the Soul project. It provides the utilities, records, persistence, network, and public API that all other modules (combat, hitbox, mobs, render, etc.) will use.
body:
# Soulcore
Soul-core is the common library/foundation of the Soul project. It provides the utilities, records, persistence, network, and public API that all other modules (combat, hitbox, mobs, render, etc.) will use. It is designed to be stable, modular, and easy to replace internals without breaking the rest of the ecosystem.
